description:
Hi Off-Mic team,

I signed up to the newsletter on the landing page but never received the confirmation email. Can you check if I am on the list before the launch? Loving the pilot episodes.

Thanks,
Nandi
subject: Newsletter confirmation email never arrived

description:
Hi Asha,

When does Off-Mic actually launch? I keep checking the site and only see the two pilots. Is there a firm date so I can tell my friends to subscribe?

Thanks,
Lwandile
subject: When does Off-Mic launch?

description:
Hello,

I placed a pre-order for the Off-Mic supporter shop tote bag but the page never showed an order number. Did my order go through? My card was charged R250.

Regards,
Priya
subject: No order number after supporter shop pre-order

description:
Hi Asha,

The second pilot cuts out at around 18 minutes when I listen on my phone. The first pilot plays fine. Is it a problem on my side or the file?

Thanks,
Zinhle
subject: Pilot episode 2 cuts out at 18 minutes

description:
Hi Off-Mic,

I run a small Latin music night in Melville and would love to pitch myself as a guest to talk about the Joburg salsa scene. I have dates open in August. How do I send a proper pitch?

Best,
Themba
subject: Guest pitch: Joburg salsa scene

description:
Hi,

I would like to support Off-Mic but the shop only seems to ship within South Africa. I am in Cape Town, is that covered? And do you take EFT as well as card?

Thanks,
Lerato
subject: Shop shipping and payment options

description:
Hi Asha,

Will Off-Mic be on Spotify and Apple Podcasts at launch, or only on the website player? I want to add it to my podcast app now so I do not miss episode one.

Thanks,
Sibongile
subject: Which podcast apps will Off-Mic be on?

description:
Hello Off-Mic,

I am a community organiser in Soweto and would like to pitch a guest segment on youth media projects. I heard you on Rhythm FM and think it fits the show. Where do I send details?

Regards,
Karabo
subject: Guest pitch: youth media projects in Soweto

description:
Hi Asha,

It is Mandla. Following up on our chat about coming on Off-Mic to talk South African music history. Happy to lock a recording date once you launch. Just confirm what format you want.

Mandla
subject: Guest pitch follow-up: SA music history episode

description:
Dear Off-Mic,

Reverend Grace here. I would like to offer myself as a guest on community and faith life in Melville for one of your early episodes. Please let me know how to proceed.

Blessings,
Grace
subject: Guest pitch: community and faith life in Melville

description:
Hi,

The newsletter signup form on the landing page does not accept my email. It says invalid even though it is a normal gmail address. Tried on Chrome and Safari.

Thanks,
Ayanda
subject: Signup form rejects valid email address

description:
Hi Off-Mic team,

Would you consider a supporter tier with early access to episodes? I would happily pay monthly for that. Just an idea for the launch.

Cheers,
Tshepo
subject: Suggestion: monthly supporter tier with early access

description:
Hello,

I bought a supporter mug in the presale and want to update my delivery address before it ships. Can you change it from my old Rosebank address to a Sandton one?

Thanks,
Refilwe
subject: Update delivery address on presale order

description:
Hi Asha,

Long-time listener of The Asha Show. Just wanted to say the Off-Mic pilots are brilliant. Any chance of a transcript for the episodes for those of us who are hard of hearing?

Thank you,
Bongani
subject: Request: transcripts for accessibility

description:
Hi,

I tried to share the Off-Mic landing page on WhatsApp but the preview shows no title or image, just the raw link. Might want to fix that before launch so it looks good when people share it.

Regards,
Mpho
subject: Landing page link preview is broken when shared

description:
Hi Off-Mic,

I am a sound engineer and heard you have pilots cut already. I would love to pitch myself to help with post-production once you go weekly. Can I send a showreel?

Thanks,
Naledi
subject: Pitch: post-production help for weekly episodes
